name: Gardiner Healthcare Acquisitions Corp. Warrant
summary: Gardiner Healthcare Acquisitions Corp. Warrant gives the holder the right to purchase shares of common stock of Gardiner Healthcare Acquisitions Corp. at a specified price. The company is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Gardiner Healthcare Acquisitions Corp. is based in the United States.
